full_name: Nickel Alloy, Corrosion and Heat-Resistant, Sheet, Strip, and Plate, 47.5Ni-22Cr-1.5Co-9.0Mo-0.60W-18.5Fe, Solution Heat Treated (Hastelloy X / UNS N06002)
version_year: see SAE catalog for current revision
scope: Hastelloy X (UNS N06002) nickel-base superalloy sheet, strip, and plate in the solution-annealed condition for high-temperature aerospace applications such as combustor and afterburner components.

chemical_composition.note: Limiting composition of Hastelloy X as widely published by independent sources (Haynes International, MatWeb); values in wt%.

mechanical_properties.note: Typical room-temperature properties in the solution-annealed condition, from independent datasheets.

license_note: Alloy composition/property data for Hastelloy X is widely published by independent free sources (Haynes International, MatWeb, ASM). Not reproduced from the copyrighted AMS document; AMS 5536 designation used only as an identifier.
